name: Xiuhong Li
title: PhD · Deep Learning System & GPU Architecture
bio: I am currently serves as Vice President at Infinigence AI, where I am responsible for MaaS technologies. I received both my bachelor's degree and Ph.D. from Peking University. Prior to joining Infinigence AI, I held positions at SenseTime and Peking University, accumulating extensive industry and research experience in deep learning systems.

researchInterests.title: Deep Learning System
researchInterests.description: System design for LLM including inference, training, and production

researchInterests.title: GPU Architecture
researchInterests.description: GPU architecture and its related architecutres at large scale Datacenter
